title: Authentic Bratwurst with Sautéed Onions and Bell Peppers
description: A hearty German-inspired dish featuring juicy bratwurst sausages, sautéed onions, and bell peppers, served with a side of crusty bread.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil, then blanch the bratwurst sausages for 5 minutes.
Remove the sausages from the water and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the sausages in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the sausages are cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and sauté until tender, about 8-10 minutes.
Add the cooked bratwurst sausages to the skillet and stir to combine with the onions and bell peppers.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the bratwurst mixture on a bed of flaky pastry, cut into slices.
Garnish with fresh parsley or chives, if desired.
